name: Banana Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup packed brown sugar (you could use less)
zest of 1/2 a lemon (you could use more)
2 beaten eggs (I used egg-beaters, I'm not familiar with how ener-G works, but it would be ok here)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, mix together the dry ingredients: flour, salt, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and allspice.
3. Combine the wet ingredients in another bowl: mashed bananas, baby food prunes, brown sugar, lemon juice, lemon zest, eggs, and vanilla extract. Mix thoroughly until well combined.
4. Add the wet mixture to the dry mixture and mix until just combined (do not overmix).
5. Grease a loaf pan with oil spray.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
7. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before transferring it to a wire rack to cool completely.
